message.content:
Read these files and return their full contents. I need to understand existing patterns for building the discovery feature:

1. server/services/getService.js - look for attachUserInteractionFlags and general service patterns
2. server/controller/storyController.js - look for controller patterns (thin wrapper, try/catch)
3. server/routes/routes.js - look for route registration patterns
4. client/API/Api.js - look for API function patterns
5. client/src/components/HomePage/ContentViewer/ContentView.jsx - lines around 640-660, look for the article closing tag area

For each file, return:
- The relevant code sections
- Any patterns I should follow (error handling, response format, etc.)
- For ContentView.jsx specifically, show me lines 620-680 so I can see exactly where to insert the RelatedPosts component
